title: Nuage easy breath menthol Vapour patches - 6 patches - soothing menthol camphor and eucalyptus oil patch - natural menthol nasal congestion relief for cold and flu - suitable for children over 3 years
features: SOOTHING RELIEF - Experience soothing relief and breathe easier with this pack of 6 vapour patches, formulated with a powerful blend of menthol, camphor, and eucalyptus oil. Designed to provide cool, clear breathing, these self-adhesive patches are perfect for those seeking relief from nasal congestion, colds, or sinus discomfort.

NATURAL POWER - Combining the natural power of menthol, camphor, and eucalyptus oil, these vapour patches provide fast and effective relief from nasal congestion and breathing discomfort. Menthol provides a cooling sensation that helps to open nasal passages, promoting clear breathing. Camphor acts as a natural decongestant, relieving chest congestion and sinus discomfort. Eucalyptus Oil known for its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties; it eases breathing difficulties.

EASY TO USE - Convenient and hygienic application with self-adhesive backing. Simply stick the patches to your clothing around the chest area or onto your pillow for a gentle, calming vapour release. The refreshing aroma helps to clear nasal passages, promoting easier breathing and restful sleep. For safe and effective use, apply the patches at least 30cm away from the face and not directly onto the skin.

CONVENIENT PACK SIZE - One pack Includes 6 individual patches, providing ample supply for multiple uses. Each pack is individually wrapped, compact and portable, ideal for home, travel, or keeping on hand for sudden congestion relief. A must-have for maintaining clear breathing and restful sleep.
